items.title: Musk v. Altman week 1: Elon Musk says he was duped, warns AI could kill us all, and admits that xAI distills OpenAI’s models
items.raw_content: In the first week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk took the stand in a crisp black suit and tie and argued that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and president Greg Brockman had deceived him into bankrolling the company. Along the way, he warned that AI could destroy us all and sat through…
items.ai_summary: 马斯克在庭审首周称被奥特曼欺骗资助OpenAI，警告AI可能毁灭人类，并承认xAI蒸馏OpenAI模型。

items.title: A new US phone network for Christians aims to block porn and gender-related content
items.raw_content: A new US-wide cell phone network marketed to Christians is set to launch next week. It blocks porn, which experts in network security say marks the first time a US cell plan has used network-level blocking for such content that can’t be turned off even by adult account owners. It’s also rolling out a filter…
items.ai_summary: 美国新基督教手机网络将屏蔽色情及性别相关内容，为美国首个网络级屏蔽方案。

items.title: Cyber-Insecurity in the AI Era
items.raw_content: Cybersecurity was already under strain before AI entered the stack. Now, as AI expands the attack surface and adds new complexity, the limits of legacy approaches are becoming harder to ignore. This session from MIT Technology Review’s EmTech AI conference explores why security must be rethought with AI at its core, not layered on after…
items.ai_summary: EmTech AI会议探讨AI时代网络安全新挑战，传统方法已不足以应对。

items.title: Operationalizing AI for Scale and Sovereignty
items.raw_content: Companies are taking control of their own data to tailor AI for their needs. The challenge lies in balancing ownership with the safe, trusted flow of high‑quality data needed to power reliable insights. This conversation from MIT Technology Review’s EmTech AI conference examines how AI factories unlock new levels of scale, sustainability, and governance—positioning data…
items.ai_summary: 企业通过AI工厂实现数据主权与规模化，平衡所有权与数据流通。

items.title: This startup’s new mechanistic interpretability tool lets you debug LLMs
items.raw_content: The San Francisco–based startup Goodfire just released a new tool, called Silico, that lets researchers and engineers peer inside an AI model and adjust its parameters—the settings that determine a model’s behavior—during training. This could give model makers more fine-grained control over how this technology is built than was once thought possible. Goodfire claims Silico…
items.ai_summary: 初创公司Goodfire推出Silico工具，可调试LLM内部参数，实现细粒度控制。

items.title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
items.raw_content: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. Ahead of OpenAI’s highly anticipated IPO, the court could rule on whether the company is allowed to exist as a for-profit enterprise and might even oust…
items.ai_summary: 马斯克与奥特曼即将就OpenAI未来开庭，影响其IPO及营利性。

items.title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
items.raw_content: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. While consumer-facing AI tools have dazzled users with speed and ease, enterprise leaders are discovering that deploying AI at scale requires something far less glamorous but far more consequential: data…
items.ai_summary: 企业AI大规模部署最大障碍是数据基础，需重建数据栈。

items.title: The missing step between hype and profit
items.raw_content: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. In February, I picked up a flyer at an anti-AI march in London. I can’t say for sure whether or not its writers meant to riff on South Park’s underpants gnomes. But…
items.ai_summary: 社论讨论AI从炒作到盈利的缺失环节，引用伦敦反AI游行传单。

items.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
items.raw_content: On April 24, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. The model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available…
items.ai_summary: DeepSeek发布V4模型，可处理更长提示，开源设计提升效率。

items.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
items.raw_content: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and customer operations. By the end of 2025, half of companies used AI in at least three business functions, according to a recent survey. But as AI becomes…
items.ai_summary: AI在企业中快速普及，需要强数据织锦支撑业务价值。
